allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ov=d.get\('data',{}\).get\('overView',{}\); print\('cityId:', ov.get\('cityId'\)\); print\('centralId:', ov.get\('centralId'\)\); print\('mileage:', ov.get\('mileage'\)\); nav=d.get\('data',{}\).get\('modelNav',[]\); print\('Nav texts:', [n.get\('text'\) for n in nav[:5]]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('status:', d.get\('status'\)\); print\('keys in data:', list\(d.get\('data',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:10]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('ALL data keys:', list\(d.get\('data',{}\).keys\(\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('overView:', 'overView' in d.get\('data',{}\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); ov=d.get\('data',{}\).get\('overView',{}\); print\('minPrice:', ov.get\('minPrice'\), type\(ov.get\('minPrice'\)\).__name__\); print\('priceNotAvailable:', ov.get\('priceNotAvailable'\)\)")
